fields.ApplyToObjectRoot: whether this should apply to all colliders under a found object root from the hit collider rather than just the hit collider.
fields.MarkGrippable: whether to mark it as being able to be climbed.

methods.EnsureWalkRun: Set the character controller to the walk run preset.
methods.EnsureZeroG: Set the character controller to the ZeroG preset.
methods.EnsurePhysicalFly: Set the character controller to the PhysicalFly preset.
